title: ipomoea caroliniana
intro: Ipomoea caroliniana, also known as Carolina morning glory, is a perennial vine plant native to the southeastern United States. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ipomoea caroliniana include treating fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as aiding in the relief of pain and swelling. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
